Our commitment to security begins with our CEO, by prioritizing our cybersecurity program and including the CISO role in the executive management team with a direct reporting line to the CEO and the Board of Directors. AMI’s CISO also manages the CIO organization to better align CISO, CIO, and related IT operations priorities. The AMI Security Team’s mission is to rapidly respond to security issues, eliminate vulnerabilities in our products and safeguard customer information.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_toggle title=”AMI Quality Policy Statement” open_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”$||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”24px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”!||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”24px” disabled_on=”off|off|off” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”–et_global_heading_font|700||on|||||” title_font_size=”14px” title_letter_spacing=”3px” title_line_height=”2em” closed_title_font=”Aptos|700|||||||” body_font=”||||||||” body_line_height=”1.8em” custom_margin=”4px||20px|||” animation_style=”slide” animation_direction=”left” animation_delay=”200ms” animation_intensity_slide=”5%” border_radii=”on|10px|10px|10px|10px” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

AMI is committed to:

  • Complying with all applicable statutory, regulatory, and industry-specific requirements.
  • Engaging employees in quality initiatives and empowering them to contribute to improvement efforts.
  • Monitoring and analyzing performance metrics to drive accountability and excellence.
  • Reviewing and updating the Quality Management System to ensure alignment with strategic goals and evolving customer needs.

Our resiliency plan defines our ability to recover and continue operations – by incorporating an air gap data strategy, data recovery, ransomware protection, code integrity, recovery table-tops, breach response and much more.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” use_background_color_gradient=”on” background_color_gradient_direction=”45deg” background_color_gradient_stops=”rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 0%|rgba(255,255,255,0.15) 100%” custom_padding=”20px|20px|40px|20px|false|true” custom_padding_tablet=”20px|20px|40px|20px|false|true” custom_padding_phone=”10px|20px|30px|20px|false|true” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|phone” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_width_all=”1px” border_color_all=”rgba(179,179,179,0.38)” global_colors_info=”{}” border_color_all__hover_enabled=”on|hover” border_color_all__hover=”#b3b3b3″][et_pb_blurb title=”Compliance” image=”https://www.ami.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/file-circle-check-sharp-light-full.svg” image_icon_width=”50px” icon_alignment=”left” content_max_width=”90%” content_max_width_tablet=”90%” content_max_width_phone=”100%” content_max_width_last_edited=”on|phone” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Aptos|600|||||||” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_font_size=”1.9vw” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#FFFFFF” body_line_height=”1.3em” image_icon_custom_margin=”||20px||false|false” custom_margin=”auto||||false|false” custom_padding=”50px||30px||false|false” custom_padding_tablet=”50px||50px||true|false” custom_padding_phone=”30px||30px||true|false” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|phone” header_font_size_tablet=”32px” header_font_size_phone=”28px” header_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

AMI adheres to ISO27001 and NIST CSF controls, as well as local data protection acts like GDPR. AMI is ISO27001 certified (Certificate #: IS 787523) for all its global locations and product lines.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” use_background_color_gradient=”on” background_color_gradient_direction=”45deg” background_color_gradient_stops=”rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 0%|rgba(255,255,255,0.15) 100%” custom_padding=”20px|20px|40px|20px|false|true” custom_padding_tablet=”20px|20px|40px|20px|false|true” custom_padding_phone=”10px|20px|30px|20px|false|true” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|phone” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_width_all=”1px” border_color_all=”rgba(179,179,179,0.38)” global_colors_info=”{}” border_color_all__hover_enabled=”on|hover” border_color_all__hover=”#b3b3b3″][et_pb_blurb title=”Privacy” image=”https://www.ami.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/shield-check-sharp-light-full-1.svg” image_icon_width=”50px” icon_alignment=”left” content_max_width=”90%” content_max_width_tablet=”90%” content_max_width_phone=”100%” content_max_width_last_edited=”on|phone” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Aptos|600|||||||” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_font_size=”1.9vw” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#FFFFFF” body_line_height=”1.3em” image_icon_custom_margin=”||20px||false|false” custom_margin=”auto||||false|false” custom_padding=”50px||30px||false|false” custom_padding_tablet=”50px||50px||true|false” custom_padding_phone=”30px||30px||true|false” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|phone” header_font_size_tablet=”32px” header_font_size_phone=”28px” header_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

AMI safeguards sensitive customer information and IP through a global program of dedicated people, process and technology solutions to ensure advanced Data Leakage Prevention (DLP) capabilities across our organization.

excerpt.rendered: Committed to providing the highest level of security in our products, with our AMI Security Team standing by for rapid response.Our commitment to security begins with our CEO, by prioritizing our cybersecurity program and including the CISO role in the executive management team with a direct reporting line to the CEO and the Board […]
